Vitex agnus-castus is a perennial shrub native to the Mediterranean region, known for its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The plant has been used in traditional medicine to treat various health issues, including anxiety, insomnia, and menstrual disorders, due to its potential to regulate hormonal imbalances and promote relaxation. The bioactive constituents of Vitex agnus-castus include flavonoids, alkaloids, and phenolic acids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. The most common herbal preparations made with Vitex agnus-castus include tea, capsules, and tinctures, which can be used to support female reproductive health and alleviate symptoms of menopause.
